entries.name: Icebound Fortitude
entries.desc: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Death Strike
entries.desc: Focuses dark power into a strike that deals 53 Physical damage and heals you for 20.00% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

entries.name: Raise Dead
entries.desc: Raises a ghoul to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one ghoul at a time. Lasts 1 min.

entries.name: Runic Attenuation
entries.desc: Auto attacks have a chance to generate 3 Runic Power.

entries.name: Improved Death Strike
entries.desc: Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%.

entries.name: Mind Freeze
entries.desc: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

entries.name: Blinding Sleet
entries.desc:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Gloom Ward
entries.desc: Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

entries.name: March of Darkness
entries.desc: Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec.

entries.name: Wraith Walk
entries.desc:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

entries.name: Unholy Momentum
entries.desc: Increases Haste by 2%.

entries.name: Control Undead
entries.desc: Dominates the target undead creature up to level 71, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.

entries.name: Enfeeble
entries.desc: Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Coldthirst
entries.desc: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants 10 Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.

entries.name: Proliferating Chill
entries.desc: Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Permafrost
entries.desc: Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Veteran of the Third War
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 20%.

entries.name: Death Pact
entries.desc: Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.

entries.name: Brittle
entries.desc: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

entries.name: Blood Bond
entries.desc: While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.

entries.name: Icy Talons
entries.desc: Your Runic Power spending abilities increase your melee attack speed by 6% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

entries.name: Death Notes
entries.desc: Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.

entries.name: Anti-Magic Zone
entries.desc: Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec, reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.

entries.name: Death Defiance
entries.desc: The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.

entries.name: Unholy Bond
entries.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.

entries.name: Ice Prison
entries.desc: Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.

entries.name: Asphyxiate
entries.desc: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

entries.name: Death's Reach
entries.desc:
Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

entries.name: Assimilation
entries.desc: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

entries.name: Grip of the Dead
entries.desc: Death and Decay reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.

entries.name: Suppression
entries.desc: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Blood Scent
entries.desc: Increases Leech by 3%.

entries.name: Unholy Endurance
entries.desc: Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.

entries.name: Osmosis
entries.desc: Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.

entries.name: Insidious Chill
entries.desc: Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Runic Protection
entries.desc: Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

entries.name: Blood Draw
entries.desc:
When you fall below 30% health you drain 42 health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec.

Can only occur every 2 min.

entries.name: Rune Mastery
entries.desc: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Subduing Grasp
entries.desc: When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Will of the Necropolis
entries.desc: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

entries.name: Null Magic
entries.desc: Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

entries.name: Unyielding Will
entries.desc: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

entries.name: Death's Echo
entries.desc: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Vestigial Shell
entries.desc: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 148 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

entries.name: Outbreak
entries.desc:
Inflicts the target with Dread Plague and Virulent Plague.

Dread Plague
A malicious plague that deals 153 Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for 64 Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time.

Virulent Plague
An infectious plague that spreads to all nearby enemies, dealing 70 Shadow damage over 24 sec.

entries.name: Scourge Strike
entries.desc:
An unholy strike that deals 47 Shadow damage and causing your plagues on the target to erupt, dealing their damage an additional time at 35% effectiveness.

Applies Virulent Plague or spreads it to a nearby enemy.

entries.name: Sudden Doom
entries.desc: Dread Plague has a 35% chance to exhilarate you, making your next Death Coil or Epidemic cost 15 less Runic Power and deal 35% increased damage.

entries.name: Clawing Shadows
entries.desc:
Shadows guide your strikes, increasing the damage of your Scourge Strike by 25%, and causing it to grant you Clawing Shadows up to 4 times.

For each stack of Clawing Shadows, your Scourge Strike chains to an additional enemy. Each subsequent chain deals 20% reduced damage.

entries.name: Putrefy
entries.desc: Summon a Lesser Ghoul to strike the enemy for 82 Shadow damage and have them explode for 42 Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Dark Transformation
entries.desc:
Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec.

Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Foul Infections
entries.desc: Your diseases deal 10% more damage and have a 5% increased chance to critically strike.

entries.name: Plague Mastery
entries.desc: Critical strike damage of your diseases is increased by 25%

entries.name: Grave Mastery
entries.desc: Critical strike damage of your minions is increased by 15%

entries.name: Necromancer's Cunning
entries.desc: When your Lesser Ghouls expire, they explode in viscera, dealing 14 Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

entries.name: Ebon Fever
entries.desc: Plagues deal 15% more damage over time in 75% of their duration.

entries.name: Festering Scythe
entries.desc:
Festering Strike now follows up with a Festering Scythe that costs no Runes.

Festering Scythe
Slashes through all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, dealing 35 Shadow damage and hastening all of your plagues on targets hit to deal damage 35% faster for 25 sec.

entries.name: Superstrain
entries.desc: Dread Plague deals damage to an additional nearby enemy at 75% effectiveness and has a chance to grant you 4 Runic Power.

entries.name: Soul Reaper
entries.desc:
Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing 158 Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Consumes up to 2 available charges to cast Putrefy.

entries.name: Magus of the Dead
entries.desc: Dark Transformation and Army of the Dead summon a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

entries.name: Infected Claws
entries.desc: The infected claws of your ghouls have a chance to sicken the foe, dealing 7 Shadow damage over 12 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

entries.name: Cycle of Death
entries.desc:
Putrefy reduces the cooldown of Death and Decay by 1.0 sec.

Death and Decay reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 0.3 sec for each enemy it damages, up to 3.0 sec.

entries.name: Coil of Devastation
entries.desc: Death Coil deals 10% increased damage and causes the target to take an additional 30% of the direct damage dealt over 4 sec.

entries.name: Army of the Dead
entries.desc:
Summons a legion of 8 empowered Lesser Ghouls that last for 15 sec to swarm your enemies.

Generates 40 Runic Power.

entries.name: Reaping
entries.desc:
Scourge Strike, Festering Strike, and Death Coil deal 30% additional damage to enemies below 35% health.

Dark Transformation resets Soul Reaper's cooldown and allows it to be used on any target.

entries.name: Menacing Magus
entries.desc: Your Magus of the Dead Shadow Bolt now fires a volley of Shadow Bolts at up to 8 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Ghoulish Frenzy
entries.desc: Dark Transformation increases the attack speed and damage of you and your Monstrosity by 5% for 15 sec.

entries.name: Morbidity
entries.desc: Diseased enemies take 1% increased damage from you per disease they are affected by.

entries.name: Harbinger of Doom
entries.desc:
Sudden Doom triggers 30% more often and can accumulate up to 2 charges.

Summoning a Lesser Ghoul with Scourge Strike reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 2.5 sec.

entries.name: Raise Abomination
entries.desc: Army of the Dead now raises an Abomination for 30 sec to attack enemies while emitting a disease cloud, dealing 12 Plague damage to nearby enemies every 2 sec.

entries.name: Summon Gargoyle
entries.desc:
Army of the Dead now summons a Gargoyle into the battlefield to bombard your enemies for 25 sec.

The Gargoyle gains 1% increased damage for every 1 Runic Power you spend and always critically strikes.

entries.name: Unholy Devotion
entries.desc:
Putrefy causes your permanent Ghoul to go on an unholy frenzy, increasing its attack speed and energy regeneration by 25% for 12 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: All Will Serve
entries.desc:
Raise Dead summons an additional skeletal archer at your command that shoots Blighted Arrows.

Blighted Arrow
An unholy arrow that deals 11 Shadow damage. When consuming Sudden Doom, your Death Coil commands your archer to fire an additional Blighted Arrow at 80% effectiveness. Epidemic will instead cause Blighted Arrow to ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets.

entries.name: Blightburst
entries.desc:
The explosion effect of Putrefy extends the duration of your plagues by 4.5 sec and deals 35% of the damage they would deal over that time instantly.

Putrefy now applies your plagues to unaffected targets.

entries.name: Putrid Echoes
entries.desc: Putrefy deals 20% increased damage, has 2 additional charges and consumes up to 2 available charges.

entries.name: Doomed Bidding
entries.desc: Consuming Sudden Doom summons forth a Lesser Ghoul to assist you for 6 sec.

entries.name: Scourging
entries.desc:
Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at 50% effectiveness.

Clawing Shadows can now stack 1 additional times.

entries.name: Ancient Power
entries.desc:
Spending Runic Power increases your Strength by 0.50% for 20 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Unholy Aura
entries.desc: Each Magus of the Dead under your command grants you 1.0% Haste.

entries.name: Commander of the Dead
entries.desc:
Dark Transformation empowers your Gargoyle, Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 25%.

The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 0% of your Mastery.

entries.name: Blightfall
entries.desc:
Dark Transformation grants access to Blightfall.

Blightfall
Consume 100% of your plagues around you and deal 100% of their remaining damage instantly.

Grants 1 charge of Putrefy.

entries.name: Reanimation
entries.desc:
When you Putrefy a Lesser Ghoul, it has a 100% chance to reanimate as a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

Magus of the Dead Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts deal 25% increased damage.

entries.name: Outnumber
entries.desc:
Each Lesser Ghoul increases the damage of your permanent Ghoul by 10%, and Dark Transformation additionally empowers the Claw attacks of your Lesser Ghouls to Sweeping Claws.

Sweeping Claws
Rakes an enemy with deformed claws, dealing 24 Shadow damage to the target and 16 Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Forbidden Knowledge
entries.desc:
Army of the Dead siphons the power of the fallen, transforming Death Coil and Epidemic into Necrotic Coil and Graveyard for 30 sec.

Necrotic Coil
Unleash a vortex of necrotic energy and bone, dealing 76 Shadowstrike damage up to 3 foes and 24 Shadow damage to all pierced enemies.

Graveyard
The dead erupt beneath all foes with Virulent Plague, dealing 34 Shadow damage and 13 Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

entries.name: Infliction of Sorrow
entries.desc: When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and deals 10% of the remaining damage to the enemy.

entries.name: Incite Terror
entries.desc:
Vampiric Strike and Scourge Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

entries.name: Inevitable
entries.desc: Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

entries.name: The Blood is Life
entries.desc:
Dark Transformation summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
entries.desc: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

entries.name: Desecrate
entries.desc: Death and Decay deals its damage 100% faster.

entries.name: Vampiric Strike
entries.desc:
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next Scourge Strike become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

entries.name: Gift of the San'layn
entries.desc:
While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Scourge Strike for the duration.

entries.name: Pact of the San'layn
entries.desc: You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

entries.name: Sanguine Scent
entries.desc: Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Vampiric Aura
entries.desc:
Your Leech is increased by 2%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

entries.name: Bloody Fortitude
entries.desc:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.

entries.name: Newly Turned
entries.desc: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Vampiric Speed
entries.desc:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
entries.desc: Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 5%, and Epidemic by 5% per stack.

entries.name: Transfusion
entries.desc:
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. 

Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Thrill of Blood
entries.desc:
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 1.0% per stack.

Blood Plague deals 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Visceral Strength
entries.desc: When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

entries.name: Horsemen's Aid
entries.desc:
While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness.

You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.

entries.name: Pact of the Apocalypse
entries.desc: When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.

entries.name: Apocalypse Now
entries.desc: Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec.

entries.name: Fury of the Horsemen
entries.desc: Every 50 Runic Power you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

entries.name: A Feast of Souls
entries.desc: While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your  increased damage.

entries.name: Hungering Thirst
entries.desc: The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%.

entries.name: Whitemane's Famine
entries.desc: When Scourge Strike damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

entries.name: Mawsworn Menace
entries.desc: Scourge Strike deals 15% increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Nazgrim's Conquest
entries.desc:
If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%.

Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.

entries.name: On a Paler Horse
entries.desc: While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

entries.name: Death Charge
entries.desc:
Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects.

For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

entries.name: Trollbane's Icy Fury
entries.desc: Scourge Strike shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing 36 Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Rider's Champion
entries.desc:
Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec.

Mograine
Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage.

Whitemane
Casts Undeath on your target dealing 2 Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed.

Trollbane
Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec.

Nazgrim
While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

entries.name: Mograine's Might
entries.desc: Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain  while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

entries.name: Unholy Armaments
entries.desc: The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage..

entries.name: Let Terror Reign
entries.desc: Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness.

entries.name: Ride or Die!
entries.desc: Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec.
